title: Guns plus
description: Guns plus is a mod that adds multiple guns to the game! so far there is only 2 items but there is more to come!
body:
Guns plus is a mod that adds multiple guns to the game! so far there is only 2 items but there is more to come!

Pistol
the pistol is a fast and strong gun and is crafted with iron and iron blocks

bullet
its display name is bulletb because this is a b class bullet this is used for the pistol and is crafted from gunpowder and coal
